Home›Services› Defense Advisory
Service

Defense & Government
Advisory

Cybersecurity compliance within the defense industrial base is not optional — it is a condition of doing business. Our practice helps defense primes, subcontractors, and government agencies achieve CMMC, NIST, and ITAR compliance with operational security programs that go beyond the checklist.

Compliance That Strengthens Your Posture

The defense industrial base is under sustained targeting from nation-state threat actors. Our team has operated within this environment — across Raytheon and Fortune 50 defense programs — tracking the adversary groups that target contractors and building the security programs that defend against them.

CMMC compliance requirements are expanding across the defense supply chain. However, passing an assessment is not equivalent to being secure. We build programs that accomplish both — satisfying every control requirement while establishing genuine defensive capability against the threats specific to your industry.

Capabilities

  • CMMC 2.0 readiness assessment and implementation planning
  • NIST 800-171 gap analysis and remediation roadmaps
  • ITAR-compliant security operations and data handling procedures
  • Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI) protection programs
  • System Security Plan (SSP) and POA&M development
  • Supply chain cybersecurity risk management
  • Nation-state threat briefings for defense leadership
  • Pre-assessment preparation and mock CMMC evaluations
  • Continuous monitoring programs for DFARS compliance

Who We Serve

Defense prime contractors preparing for CMMC Level 2 or Level 3 certification. Small and mid-size subcontractors that handle CUI but lack dedicated cybersecurity staff. Government agencies modernizing their security posture. Any organization within the defense supply chain that must achieve and maintain compliance.

Frameworks

  • CMMC 2.0 (Level 1–3)
  • NIST SP 800-171
  • NIST SP 800-53
  • ITAR / EAR
  • DFARS 252.204-7012
  • FedRAMP

Defense Experience

  • Raytheon
  • Fortune 50 Defense Programs
  • DIB Threat Intelligence
  • Nation-State APT Tracking

Get CMMC Ready

Start with a gap assessment to understand where you stand.
